title: Vex Infection
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf03e1a1c10ae96af95f3f27eb77b3465f80c8e5_0.webp)

# **Mod Description**

**The swarm has begun.**

Once summoned as the minions of evokers, Vexes have broken free — and they’re out for everything. Now, no mob is safe from the haunting blades of the infected.



## **Features:**
- Vexes now attack all mobs
- Once a mob dies to a vex the dead mob turns into a another vex
